title: 100Pcs Tags with Wire, 7x3.5cm Blank Luggage Tags, Cream Manila Price Tag, Shipping Inventory Labels with Reinforced Eyelet for Marking Gift, Luggage, Clothes, Package
features: Premium Tags with Wire: Crafted from durable cream-coloured paper and sturdy wires, these hanging tags resist daily wear while maintaining a professional look. Perfect as luggage tags, clothing labels, or gift tags that last

Wide Range of Applications: Versatile blank tags suitable for multiple uses, for example luggage labels, clothing price tags, gift wrapping, shipping labels, and craft projects. The ideal labeling solution for both personal and commercial needs

Versatile Uses: These marking tags are also perfect as gift tags on Father's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, wedding favours, birthday, etc. In addition, they are excellent for marking luggage, gifts, price, clothing, shipping and inventory etc

Package Includes: Each Package includes 100 premium paper tags (7x3.5cm/2.8x1.4in) and 100 wires, Ideal for retailers, warehouse managers, office workers, educators, event organisers and craft enthusiasts who need to mark, sort and label items with information

Excellent Writing Surface: The premium tag surface offers superior ink absorption, working perfectly with various writing tools including fountain pens or markers. Enjoy smooth writing without smudging or bleeding, making information recording clean and effortless
description: Material: Manila paper Size: 7x3.5cm/2.8x1.4in Colour: Cream Manila / Lemon Yellow Packing quantity: 100 x luggage tags 100 x wire
